text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That was so fun! Nice piloting, Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Where should we go next? We can cruise to the
beach or the mountains—anywhere is groovy with
me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Then let's go to an all-you-can-eat dessert buffet!
I wanna go to a crepe shop too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Haven't you been a bit of a glutton
lately, Maya?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
What?! No way! All I had for lunch yesterday was
some pasta...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And a piece of cake... and some pudding... and a
taiyaki... and, uh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Anyhoo, let's hit the road! Hop in!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
N-no thanks! If I eat any more, Trainer might fall
out of love with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: In that case... How about we hit the gym?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Maruzensky's suggestion, Mayano Top
Gun manages to get back in shape!
